channel.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: sports
channel.description: Get the latest news online at Major Digest, the top online news resource for the most reliable news sources. Stay informed about the world around you!

image.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: sports

item.title: UNLV's Dan Mullen reveals why working as college football analyst had its advantages
item.description: UNLV Rebels football coach Dan Mullen tells OutKick's "Don't @ Me with Dan Dakich" that working at ESPN proved to be advantageous.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Ex-ESPN star Sage Steele says company deserved to be 'crushed' for failing to show anthem before Sugar Bowl
item.description: Former ESPN star Sage Steele ripped her former employer over the decision to not show the national anthem before the Sugar Bowl in wake of the New Orleans terror attack.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Lady Vols coach Kim Caldwell about to experience another 1st with her baby due any day
item.description: Being a private person from a small town, Kim Caldwell keeps her business to herself. That's why she ducked and dodged questions for months about her first pregnancy. Then the woman who announced “Baby Caldwell” was on the way with a social media post Sept.
item.dc:creator: TERESA M. WALKER, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Australian Open 2025: How to watch on TV, betting odds and more to know
item.description: MELBOURNE, Australia (AP) — Get caught up on the Australian Open with a guide that tells you everything you need to know about how to watch the year’s first Grand Slam tennis tournament, what the betting odds are, what the schedule is and more: How to watch the Australian Open on TV — In the
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: As fires ravage Los Angeles, Tiger Woods isn't sure what will happen with Riviera tournament
item.description: PALM BEACH GARDENS, Fla. (AP) — Tiger Woods isn't sure what's going to happen with next month's Genesis Invitational, the PGA Tour event that he hosts in the fire-ravaged Pacific Palisades neighborhood of Los Angeles. He's insisting there should be far bigger concerns.
item.dc:creator: TIM REYNOLDS, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Bruins open 4-goal lead, add 2 short-handed empty-netters to beat Lightning 6-2
item.description: David Pastrnak had a goal and two assists and Parker Wotherspoon scored his first NHL goal on Tuesday night to help the Boston Bruins open a four-goal lead and hold on to beat the Tampa Bay Lightning 6-2.
item.dc:creator: JIMMY GOLEN, WFLA, NBC

item.title: Beck hopes to bring big play ability to Utes offense
item.description: SALT LAKE CITY (ABC4 Sports) - When Kyle Whittingham called former BYU quarterback Jason Beck about becoming the Utes new offensive coordinator, Beck jumped at the chance. "When I hit that time of year and had some opportunities come up, and and Coach Witt came calling," Beck said Tuesday.
item.dc:creator: Dana Greene, ABC 4

item.title: Former Cowboys Deion Sanders and Jason Witten are among names floated as club's next coach
item.description: Deion Sanders and Jason Witten are two of Dallas Cowboys owner Jerry Jones' former — and favorite — players, and both have been floated as potential replacements for coach Mike McCarthy. Jones and McCarthy agreed Monday to part ways after five seasons together.
item.dc:creator: SCHUYLER DIXON, Associated Press, PHL 17

item.title: Breanna Stewart given franchise tag by New York Liberty for second straight year
item.description: New York's Breanna Stewart was one of a handful of players given the franchise tag by their WNBA teams, meaning they can't sign a contract directly with anyone else.
item.dc:creator: DOUG FEINBERG, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Former Cowboys star Jason Witten floated as potential head coach replacement following Mike McCarthy's exit
item.description: Mike McCarthy is out in Dallas, but the Cowboys are reportedly keeping an eye on a former star player as it searches for its next head coach.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Ohio State has slowly paced itself on offense all the way to the national championship game
item.description: Ohio State has been purposely pacing itself on offense all season, huddling more and trying to limit the number of snaps in each game of what the Buckeyes hoped and anticipated would be a long run. “I know it sounds crazy, the huddle, it’s almost like going back in time,” coach Ryan Day said.
item.dc:creator: STEPHEN HAWKINS, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Tim Tebow, wife Demi-Leigh announce pregnancy with 1st child
item.description: Tim Tebow and his wife, Demi-Leigh, announced on Tuesday that they are pregnant with their first child. They made the announcement on social media.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Oakland Coliseum buyers closing in on Alameda County’s approval of massive sale
item.description: AASEG promises to transform the property into a new hub of restaurants, retail, housing, entertainment and live sports.
item.dc:creator: Shomik Mukherjee, The Mercury News

item.title: San Diego Wave FC trades Jaedyn Shaw to the North Carolina Courage
item.description: Midfielder Jaedyn Shaw has been traded by the San Diego Wave FC to the North Carolina Courage, the football club announced Tuesday.
item.dc:creator: Rhea Caoile, Fox 5

item.title: WATCH: Girls basketball coach accused of hitting person with car after argument
item.description: A girls' youth basketball coach is accused of hitting a person with his vehicle after an argument following a game Saturday in Columbia, according to state police, and it was caught on surveillance video.
item.dc:creator: Jenn Brink, Fox 5

item.title: NFL playoffs: Matchups, history and what to know for Divisional Round weekend
item.description: As the Bears' search for a new head coach intensifies — and seemingly now includes every candidate out there (see our Coaching Tracker) — there are still eight teams left in the NFL playoffs. Obviously, this is where the Bears hope their new coach will take them one day, and beyond.
item.dc:creator: Michael Johnson, WGN 9

item.title: Report: Cubs not among Roki Sasaki's final 3 teams
item.description: CHICAGO — The Cubs were among the teams told they were out as the free agency frenzy for Japanese phenom pitcher Roki Sasaki has been narrowed to three clubs, according to a new report.
item.dc:creator: Andy Koval, WGN 9

item.title: Monfils outduels fellow Frenchman in an Australian Open 1st-round match for the ages
item.description: MELBOURNE, Australia (AP) — The pragmatic pro in Gael Monfils would like to have finished off his first-round win in straight sets against up-and-coming fellow Frenchman Giovanni Mpetshi Perricard at the Australian Open.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Former Padres Peavy, Gonzalez headline 77th Salute to the Champions
item.description: The Padres duo, along with WNBA star Charde Houston, now have a permanent place inside the Western Metal Supply Company building at Petco Park as Breitbard Hall of Famers.
item.dc:creator: Brandon Stone, Fox 5

item.title: Dominant Rams makes themselves at home in Arizona with rout of Vikings
item.description: It was an exhilarating playoff victory for a Rams team that left L.A. on Friday to escape the fires that have devastated the Southland.
item.dc:creator: Tribune News Service, The Mercury News

item.title: The Athletic's Dianna Russini provides a look inside the Bears search for their next head coach
item.description: The Chicago Bears have requested interviews with 19 candidates for their next head coach, including Mike McCarthy, Thomas Brown, Ron Rivera, Ben Johnson, Todd Monken, and Steve Sarkisian, while the ambiguity around Ryan Poles' contract situation may make it more difficult for the Bears to hire their
item.dc:creator: Jarrett Payton, WGN 9

item.title: Lamar Jackson and Josh Allen will face off for a berth in the AFC championship game
item.description: Lamar Jackson vs. Josh Allen won’t decide the NFL MVP next week. The stakes are higher with a spot in the AFC championship game on the line.
item.dc:creator: ROB MAADDI, Associated Press, Fox 5

item.title: Bronco's season comes to an end following 31-7 loss to Buffalo
item.description: GRAND JUNCTION, Colo. (KREX)—The Denver Broncos’ long-awaited playoff return ended Sunday in Upstate New York. After eight years away from the postseason, the Broncos found themselves in the spotlight, led by rookie quarterback Bo Nix.
item.dc:creator: Titus Cleveland, KREX 5

item.title: Oregon Ducks 2024 receiver arrested as fugitive
item.description: Ryan Tristan Chance Taylor -- who played under the name Ryan Pellum -- allegedly used a 9mm pistol to assault someone on December 25 in Long Beach, California.
item.dc:creator: Tim Steele, NewsNation

item.title: Coaching Tracker: The Bears' search to find their next head coach
item.description: The Chicago Bears have assembled a six-person panel to find their next head coach, with Ryan Poles as the final decision-maker, and have requested to interview Joe Brady, Thomas Brown, Matt Campbell, Pete Carroll, Brian Flores, Marcus Freeman, Aaron Glenn, Joe Brady, and David Shaw.
item.dc:creator: Eli Ong, WGN 9

item.title: Clear skies and clear minds: Rams regroup in Arizona to prepare for playoff game vs. Vikings
item.description: TEMPE, Ariz. (AP) — Everything seemed pretty normal for the Los Angeles Rams during Saturday's practice at their temporary home on a beautiful afternoon in suburban Phoenix.
item.dc:creator: DAVID BRANDT, Associated Press, Fox 5

item.title: Texans get 2 points on blocked extra point return vs. Chargers, 1st in NFL playoff history
item.description: Houston's D'Angelo Ross returned a blocked extra point for two points in the fourth quarter of the Texans' wild-card playoff victory over the Los Angeles Chargers on Saturday — the first such play in NFL postseason history.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, Fox 5

item.title: Bill McCartney, who coached Colorado to its only football national championship in 1990, has died
item.description: Bill McCartney, who coached Colorado to its only football national championship in 1990, has died. He was 84.
item.dc:creator: PAT GRAHAM, Associated Press, Fox 5

item.title: Real Salt Lake trades leading scorer Chicho Arango
item.description: In the span of one year, Real Salt Lake's high-powered offense has been dismantled, leaving some fans questioning the team's direction and competitive outlook.
item.dc:creator: Mattey Casey, ABC 4
